metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4175
metadata.comment:
Rationale: - Postembedding immunogold EM of adult rat cerebral cortex was performed using 254.2 anti-liprin2-antibody.

- Fig5B-C: EM images show the expression of gold particles adjacent to the postsynaptic membrane.

- Fig5E quantifies the distribution of gold particles relative to the postsynaptic membrane (value of 0). The high peak within 50 nm of the postsynaptic membrane is suggestive of liprin-alpha 2 being localized in close proximity to the postsynaptic membrane in the postsynaptic specialization.

- Fig. 3: Double immunofluorescence experiments demonstrated localization of liprin-alpha 2 with the postsynaptic protein GRIP along dendrites.. Experimental description: Rat hippocampal neuron cultures were prepared from hippocampi dissected from E18 rat embryos as described (Goslin and Banker, 1991).
